summary: Termovent is a Serbian HVAC manufacturer headquartered in Belgrade, founded in 1993. Family company with ~200 employees. Main products include Air Handling Units (AHU), clean rooms, HVAC equipment, and process systems. Operates manufacturing facilities in Belgrade and Kladovo. Growing presence in Southeast European HVAC market.
notes: Southeast European market entry point. HVAC manufacturer may need circulating pumps for their systems. Family company - relationship-driven sales approach.
